programme_name: Rinn Artificial Intelligence – Research & Innovation in Data Science and AI
paraphrase: Rinn Artificial Intelligence is a national research and innovation centre designed to advance foundational research in Data Science and AI while supporting open, international, interdisciplinary and transdisciplinary research addressing major societal challenges.

facts.national_investment_note: Total centre award from Research Ireland; NOT funding personally awarded to Dr Afli or allocated to MTU.

verification.national_director: Prof. Noel O'Connor (DCU) — national director; Dr Afli is an INSTITUTIONAL (MTU) co-lead, not national lead

afli_roles.institutional: Institutional Co-Lead for Rinn Artificial Intelligence at MTU
afli_roles.theme: Deputy Theme Lead for Inclusive Language Model & Translation Methods
afli_roles.short: Institutional Co-Lead at MTU, Deputy Theme Lead for Inclusive Language Model & Translation Methods, and Principal Investigator in Rinn Artificial Intelligence.

theme.name: Inclusive Language Model & Translation Methods
theme.intro: The Inclusive Language Model & Translation Methods theme focuses on language technologies that work effectively across languages, cultures, communities and domains. It addresses the limitations of current language models and translation systems, particularly for under-resourced languages, culturally specific knowledge and communities that remain poorly represented in mainstream AI development.

items: language models for Arabic and other under-resourced languages
efficient adaptation of large language models
linguistic inclusion beyond high-resource English-centric systems
preservation of meaning, sentiment and pragmatic context
evaluation of bias, stereotyping and cultural misalignment
Global South perspectives in AI development
social and ethical effects of language technologies
AI systems designed around human and community needs

theme.mtu_contribution: At MTU, Dr Afli's Rinn AI activity will connect foundational language-model research with existing strengths in Human-Centred AI, multilingual NLP, responsible evaluation, computational biology, healthcare AI and research commercialisation. The work will support collaboration across computer science, language research, social sciences, health, industry and public-sector partners.

ecosystem.name: Rinn Artificial Intelligence
ecosystem.desc: National Research Ireland centre for Data Science and AI. Dr Afli's roles: Institutional Co-Lead at MTU, Deputy Theme Lead and Principal Investigator; thematic focus: Inclusive Language Model & Translation Methods.

ecosystem.name: ADAPT Centre
ecosystem.desc: National Research Ireland centre for AI-driven digital content and related technologies. Dr Afli's role: Principal Investigator and MTU research lead.

ecosystem.name: Human-Centred AI (HAI) Research Group
ecosystem.desc: MTU research group founded and led by Dr Afli, spanning multilingual AI, culturally aware AI, trustworthy evaluation, healthcare, biology and applied innovation.

ecosystem_note: These three structures are complementary but not interchangeable: Rinn AI and ADAPT are distinct national centres, and the HAI Research Group is Dr Afli's own MTU group. Their funding and governance are separate.
